US07_rate_limit.note: Assumed present (API running, no explicit headers)

DE11_pagination.label: Pagination
DE11_pagination.description: Les endpoints de collection doivent supporter la pagination (page/size ou limit/offset).

suggestions.impact: +1.4 pts/endpoint (total gap: 10 pts) — reduces payload size for large collections

DE08_fields.label: Filtrage de champs
DE08_fields.description: Supporter un parametre 'fields' pour reduire le payload.

suggestions.action: Add a 'fields' query parameter for sparse fieldsets
suggestions.impact: +0.9 pts/endpoint (total gap: 13 pts) — lets clients request only needed fields, reducing payload

DE01_compression.label: Compression
DE01_compression.description: Le serveur doit supporter Accept-Encoding: gzip.

suggestions.action: Enable gzip compression on the server
suggestions.impact: +0.8 pts/endpoint (total gap: 15 pts) — typically 60-80% payload reduction

DE02_DE03_cache.description: Les ressources unitaires doivent supporter ETag + If-None-Match -> 304.

DE06_delta.label: Delta / Changes
DE06_delta.description: Un endpoint /changes?since= ou equivalent doit exister.

suggestions.action: Add a delta/changes endpoint with a 'since' parameter
suggestions.impact: +0.6 pts/endpoint (total gap: 9 pts) — clients fetch only what changed since last sync

range_206.label: Range / Partial Content
range_206.description: Supporter le header Range pour les gros payloads.

AR02_format_cbor.label: Format binaire (CBOR)
AR02_format_cbor.description: Un endpoint en format binaire (CBOR, protobuf...) doit exister.

suggestions.action: Add a binary format alternative (CBOR or Protobuf)
suggestions.impact: +10 pts — binary formats are 30-50% smaller than JSON

suggestions.action: Add a binary format alternative (CBOR or Protobuf)
suggestions.impact: +10 pts — binary formats are 30-50% smaller than JSON

LO01_observability.label: Observabilite
LO01_observability.description: Actuator / health / metrics doit etre expose.

suggestions.how:
Spring Boot application.yml:
  management:
    endpoints:
      web:
        exposure:
          include: health,info,metrics
    endpoint:
      health:
        show-details: when-authorized

Add dependency: spring-boot-starter-actuator (likely already present).

US07_rate_limit.label: Rate Limiting
US07_rate_limit.description: Un mecanisme de rate limiting doit etre present.

suggestions.impact: +5 pts — protects the API from abuse and signals limits to clients
suggestions.how:
Option 1 — Spring Boot filter:
  Add a HandlerInterceptor or OncePerRequestFilter that adds:
    X-RateLimit-Limit: 100
    X-RateLimit-Remaining: 97
    X-RateLimit-Reset: 1620000000

Option 2 — Use Bucket4j + Spring Boot Starter:
  <dependency>com.bucket4j:bucket4j-spring-boot-starter</dependency>
  Configure rate limits in application.yml per endpoint.

Option 3 — Nginx:
  limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=api:10m rate=10r/s;
  location /api/ { limit_req zone=api burst=20; }
  add_header X-RateLimit-Limit 100;
